source_match.notes: Metadata identity matches source bundle: HKDSE English Language C&A Guide, CDC/HKEAA, 2021 edition effective from Secondary 4 in 2021/22, assessment_code none. Checksum and local archive ref recorded.

source_traceability.notes: All high-impact conclusions map to page-map references. Page references use printed/footer page numbers with documented +2 physical offset. Source review verdict is pass_with_risks with accepted risks documented.

topic_tree.notes: Topic tree is built around strands, learning objectives, language forms/functions, modules and text types rather than forced granular content topics, matching the C&A Guide nature. topic_id stable and unique within skill. Scope/out_of_scope present.

assessment_model.notes: Papers P1-P4 and SBA structure, assessment objectives for reading/writing/listening/speaking, standards-referenced reporting, confidence thresholds, generation_constraints and command-words reference all present. lesson_use correctly disabled for v1.

out_of_scope.notes: Out-of-scope rules clear. Examples include IELTS task formats and university literary theory.

examples.notes: 3 correct classification, 2 misclassification, 2 out-of-scope, 1 cross-topic examples provided. Meets minimum requirement for classification use.

portability.notes: No platform-specific dependencies. SKILL.md and templates do not mention EduFlow, Feishu, ClaudeTeam or any runtime.

p2.issue: retrieved_at is 'unknown'; should be recorded when official source is re-downloaded or confirmed.
extraction_verified is false because source bundle only had single-channel text extraction and same-agent review; independent re-review recommended before active.
Total marks per paper not extracted from the C&A Guide; should be confirmed against HKEAA examination regulations if needed for question generation.

C&A Guide does not provide a traditional content topic tree; classification granularity is intentionally coarse. Machine consumers should expect strand/skill/objective/text-type routing rather than fine subtopics.
Source extraction_confidence is medium (single-channel text extraction, same-agent review). Reviewer accepts this risk for validated status; independent re-review recommended before active.
